intended_use: Mario Maker-style map authoring vertical slice
Future extraction and slicing of the remaining local CuteSCKR RAR archives
notes: The source drop includes a top-level license.txt granting CC0/public-domain style commercial, modification, redistribution, and no-attribution use.

BND-011 promotes representative terrain sheets plus additional prop/wall classified sheets from medieval dungeon, medieval town, farm, forest wilderness, medieval castle, and cyberpunk city packs into editor-ready gameplay slices.
Remaining CuteSCKR RAR archives are still raw local source material until extracted, inspected, sliced, and recorded in a bundle manifest.
